# Keyou Zheng - LLM Profile

This file provides a concise public profile for language models.

## Identity
- Name: Keyou (Key) Zheng (郑恪悠)
- Alias: Zheng K.
- Location: Guangzhou, Guangdong, China
- Headline: Ph.D Applicant, Novice Researcher, Junior Design Engineer

## Contact
- Email: keyouzheng0915@gmail.com
- Website: https://keyzh.pages.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/Xeraphinite

## Education
- MEng in Mechanical Engineering, Guangdong University of Technology (Sep 2023 - Jun 2026, expected)
- BEng in Computer Science, Guangdong University of Finance and Economics (Sep 2019 - Jun 2023)

## Focus Areas
- LLM agents for code-based CAD and assembly generation
- Verifier-driven parametric CAD generation
- AIGC-enabled smart manufacturing workflows

## Selected Publications
- Zheng K. et al. "Towards Agentic Smart Design: An Industrial Large Model-driven Human-in-the-loop Agentic Workflow for Geometric Modelling." Applied Soft Computing. DOI: 10.1016/j.asoc.2025.113920
- Leng J. et al. "AIGC-empowered Smart Manufacturing: Prospects and Challenges." Robotics and Computer-Integrated Manufacturing. DOI: 10.1016/j.rcim.2025.103076

## Notes
- Canonical profile data source for this site is `data/cv.toml`.
